document.title: Intent, Request & Transaction Extension Catalog — Heritage Gold → LAWIM_V2
document.description: Enriched catalog of all intent detection, transaction type, and transaction workflow extensions required for LAWIM_V2

extensions.current_limitation: V2 has no intent detection — users explicitly select project_type from form
extensions.proposed_structure: Create Intent entity with source_text, detected_intent enum, confidence float, language enum, keyword_scores JSON. Build IntentEngine service with keyword dictionaries for FR, EN, PID languages. Implement KeywordIntentClassifier with per-language tokenizer, normalization (NFKD + unicode), and per-keyword weight scoring. Store Intent records for audit and pipeline traceability.
required_fields: Intent.detected_intent: Enum (buy | rent | sell | invest | search_property | find_professional | service | finance | other)
Intent.project_type_mapping: Enum (buy | rent | sell | invest | find | service | finance | other)
required_relations: Intent.project_id → Project (0:1, project spawned from intent)
required_events: intent.detected (payload: {intent_id, user_id, detected_intent, confidence, language, source_channel})
required_states: Intent.detected_intent ∈ {buy, rent, sell, invest, search_property, find_professional, service, finance, other}
H0.5_matrices_impacted: Residential Search (18 matrices) — intent pre-filters matrix selection
extensions.human_decision_question: Intent detection mandatory for all channels or chat-only (WhatsApp/Telegram)

extensions.current_limitation: No confidence scoring or threshold concept in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement configurable confidence threshold with per-channel overrides. Default 0.70 for WhatsApp/Telegram, 0.50 for Dashboard (suggestion mode), 0.80 for API (reject below). Below-threshold behavior: confidence >= 0.50 prompts user with top 2-3 options; confidence < 0.50 falls back to explicit selection or 'other'.
required_fields: Intent.threshold: Float (per-intent override, defaults from config)
extensions.human_decision_question: Confidence threshold value: 0.70 (Gold) or tunable per channel

extensions.current_limitation: V2 supports single project_type per user; no parallel intent handling
extensions.proposed_structure: Add multi-intent detection logic to IntentEngine. When 2+ intents score >= 0.70 or total score >= 1.40 with semantic distance > 0.3, set is_multi_intent=true and populate sub_intents array. Each sub-intent spawns an independent Project linked via multi_intent_group_id. Support cross-project coordination through shared group ID.
required_fields: Intent.sub_intents: JSON[] (array of {intent, confidence, entities, assigned_project_id})
Project.multi_intent_group_id: UUID? (links parallel projects from same utterance)

extensions.current_limitation: No urgency detection mechanism in V2
extensions.proposed_domain: Domain 4: Intent/Transaction Model + Domain 10: CRM Pipeline
extensions.proposed_structure: Add urgency detection to IntentEngine pipeline. Score urgency from temporal keywords (0.30), specific deadlines (0.35), negative consequences (0.20), repetition/emphasis (0.10), diaspora premium (0.05). Classify into 4 levels: low (0.00-0.25), medium (0.26-0.50), high (0.51-0.75), urgent (0.76-1.00). Store urgency on Intent and propagate to spawned Project for SLA routing.
required_states: SLA bound: low→P2, medium→P1, high→P0 (30min), urgent→P0 (15min)
extensions.human_decision_question: Urgency scoring method and integration with lead scoring

extensions.current_limitation: No structured entity extraction in V2
extensions.proposed_domain: Domain 4: Intent/Transaction Model + Domain 5: Dossier/Project Model
extensions.proposed_structure: Add per-intent entity extraction to IntentEngine. Extract budget (min/max), city, neighborhood, property_type, surface (min/max), bedrooms, furnished, timeline, and intent-specific entities. Store as normalized JSON. Auto-populate Project qualification fields from extracted entities to reduce user friction. Extraction methods: regex patterns for prices/surfaces, gazetteer lookup for locations, type dictionary for property types.
required_fields: Intent.extracted_entities: JSON (normalized entity object per intent type)
Project (auto-populated fields from entities: budget_min, budget_max, city, neighborhood, property_type, surface, bedrooms, timeline)
H0.5_matrices_impacted: All qualification matrices — entity extraction pre-fills matrix fields
extensions.human_decision_question: Entity extraction method: rule-based (Gold) or NLP

extensions.current_limitation: No formal role mapping or user role abstraction exists in V2
extensions.proposed_domain: Domain 4: Intent/Transaction Model + Domain 1: User/Role/Profile Model
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement intent-to-role mapping service. Map each detected intent to a business_role (buyer, seller, tenant, investor, visitor, client). Store project_type_mapping on Intent and assign business_role on spawned Project. Role determines qualification matrix selection, matching strategy, and CRM segmentation. Support explicit override by user after detection.
required_fields: Intent.project_type_mapping: Enum (buy | rent | sell | invest | find | service | finance | other)
Project.business_role: Enum (buyer | seller | tenant | investor | visitor | client)
required_relations: Project.user_id → User (role applies to user in project context)
Project.intent_id → Intent (0:1, source of role mapping)
required_states: Project.business_role ∈ {buyer, seller, tenant, investor, visitor, client}
Mapping: buy→buyer, rent→tenant, sell→seller, invest→investor, search_property→visitor, find_professional→client, service→client, finance→investor
H0.5_matrices_impacted: All qualification matrices — role filters available matrix families

extensions.current_limitation: Subsumed by 'rent' project_type; no dedicated short_stay handling
extensions.proposed_domain: Domain 4: Intent/Transaction Model + Domain 9: Transaction Workflow
extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'short_stay' to Transaction.transaction_type enum and Project.project_type enum (or sub-type via metadata). Implement short-stay specific fields: check_in_date, check_out_date, number_of_guests, amenities, cancellation_policy. Distinct document regime: short-term contract, ID copy, payment receipt (no tenant rights). Qualification via Hotel/Tourism sub-referentiel matrices.
extensions.human_decision_question: Short_stay: dedicated project_type or rent sub-type with metadata

extensions.current_limitation: Subsumed by 'rent' with timeline_horizon maxing at 2 years
extensions.proposed_domain: Domain 4: Intent/Transaction Model + Domain 9: Transaction Workflow
extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'lease' to Transaction.transaction_type enum. Extend Project.timeline_horizon to support 3-99 years. Implement lease-specific fields: lease_duration_years, renewal_options, indexation_clause, deposit_months (3-6 for residential). Notarization required for leases > 3 years. Separate from standard rental in qualification and document requirements.

extensions.current_limitation: No equivalent; mapped to 'other' in V2
extensions.proposed_domain: Domain 4: Intent/Transaction Model + Domain 9: Transaction Workflow
extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'cession_bail' to Transaction.transaction_type enum. Implement as transfer of commercial lease rights requiring landlord consent. Fields: original_lease_id, remaining_duration, transfer_fee, landlord_consent_status. Document requirements: original lease, landlord consent letter, transfer agreement, RCCM. Qualification via Commercial sub-referentiel.
required_fields: Transaction.cession_bail_details: JSON (original_lease_ref, remaining_months, transfer_price, landlord_consented: Boolean)
extensions.human_decision_question: Cession_bail: dedicated type or metadata extension of 'lease'

extensions.current_limitation: Subsumed by generic 'rent' with no commercial lease handling
extensions.proposed_domain: Domain 4: Intent/Transaction Model + Domain 9: Transaction Workflow
extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'bail_commercial' to Transaction.transaction_type enum. Implement OHADA-compliant commercial lease with 3-9 year terms. Fields: business_type, renovation_responsibility, signage_rights, rent_review_formula (3-2-3-2 common). Document requirements: commercial lease contract, RCCM, tax ID, business license. Tenant has statutory right to renew under OHADA.
required_fields: Transaction.bail_commercial_details: JSON (business_type, duration_years, renovation_clause, renewal_option, rent_review_formula)
H0.5_matrices_impacted: Commercial Search matrices (21 matrices, bail_commercial variant)

extensions.current_limitation: No equivalent; mapped to 'other' in V2
extensions.proposed_domain: Domain 4: Intent/Transaction Model + Domain 9: Transaction Workflow
extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'cession' to Transaction.transaction_type enum. Implement business asset transfer (fonds de commerce) workflow. Fields: business_name, rccm_number, goodwill_value, inventory_included, client_list_included, employee_list_included, handover_training. Requires publication in newspaper, registration with tax authorities, right of first refusal notification. Document requirements: RCCM, tax clearance, financial statements, lease, licenses.
required_fields: Transaction.cession_details: JSON (business_name, rccm, goodwill_value, inventory_value, includes_employees: Boolean)
Publication required: Boolean (set true for cession)
H0.5_matrices_impacted: Business transfer qualification matrices (specific to cession)
extensions.human_decision_question: Cession: in-scope for LAWIM or out-of-scope

extensions.current_limitation: Implicitly bundled into buy/invest projects; no standalone financing request type
extensions.proposed_domain: Domain 4: Intent/Transaction Model + Domain 9: Transaction Workflow
extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'finance' to Transaction.transaction_type enum and Project.project_type enum. Implement financing-specific fields: loan_amount_requested, loan_purpose, income_monthly, existing_commitments, collateral_description, preferred_term_months. 10 financing qualification matrices for different credit types. Document requirements: ID, proof of income, property documents, 3 months bank statements. Partner bank integration for credit assessment.
required_fields: Transaction.finance_details: JSON (loan_amount, purpose, term_months, income, collateral)
required_states: Transaction.finance_status ∈ {draft, submitted, under_review, approved, rejected, disbursed}
extensions.human_decision_question: Finance: standalone project type or sub-intent of buy/invest

extensions.current_limitation: No equivalent; mapped to 'other' in V2
extensions.proposed_domain: Domain 4: Intent/Transaction Model + Domain 3: Service Model
extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'find' to Transaction.transaction_type enum and Project.project_type enum. Implement professional search/discovery workflow. Fields: profession_requested, specialization, mission_description, location_preference. 27 professional search qualification matrices. Link to ServiceRequest for agent assignment. No document requirement for discovery phase; professional contact may require lead purchase. Integrate with professional matching engine.
extensions.human_decision_question: Find: core LAWIM feature or separate marketplace

extensions.current_limitation: No equivalent; mapped to 'other' in V2
extensions.proposed_domain: Domain 4: Intent/Transaction Model + Domain 3: Service Model
extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'service' to Transaction.transaction_type enum and Project.project_type enum. Implement real estate service procurement workflow. Fields: service_code (from Service catalog), service_description, scope_of_work, location, preferred_timeline. 24 real estate service qualification matrices. Link to ServiceOrder for service fulfillment and Payment lifecycle. Document requirements depend on service type (estimation vs photography vs expertise).
required_fields: Transaction.service_order_id: UUID? (links to ServiceOrder when paid service)
extensions.human_decision_question: Service procurement: integrated workflow or separate service ordering
